# KILL(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  kill — terminate a process

## SYNOPSIS
  kill [-signal] <pid>

## DESCRIPTION
Sends a signal to terminate a process by PID.
Use `ps aux` to find process IDs.

## EXAMPLES
  kill 1234
  kill -9 9174
  kill -SIGTERM 921

## NOTES
  PID 1337 (nexus heartbeat) cannot be killed without root.

## SEE ALSO
  ps, top, nice, renice
